MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for settlement conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge. Plaintiff Nasir Patel appeared in pro per and John M. Sinclair, Esq. represented Defendant Leon McNeely, II. Case settled by oral settlement agreement per the record. Trial date is vacated.
